name: Bo Rao
page_title: Bo Rao 白繞 [Black Mountain Bandits] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
In AD 185 Bao Rao was a leader among the Black Mountain Bandits in the Taihang mountain range. He raided Dong commandery in AD 191 but was defeated by Cao Cao. (1)

1) Sanguozhi: Wei 1
